title: Implement lichen_pubkey_to_human_address in C using SHA-256 IID + Crockford Base32
description: Add implementation to lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/ipv6_addr.c that calls lichen_pubkey_to_iid then encodes to human address string exactly matching Rust human_address_from_pubkey and test/vectors/node_address.json. Follow coding style from existing functions. Include secure_zero if needed.
